timeline.label: Launch
timeline.description: Artemis II lifts off and begins its journey from Earth.

timeline.label: Earth Orbit Checkout
timeline.description: Initial spacecraft checks and early orbital operations.

timeline.label: Translunar Injection
timeline.description: Orion departs Earth orbit and heads toward the Moon.

timeline.label: Outbound Coast
timeline.description: The spacecraft is coasting along the outbound leg.

timeline.label: Lunar Flyby
timeline.description: Closest approach to the Moon and path turn for return.

timeline.label: Inbound Coast
timeline.description: Orion begins the return leg back toward Earth.

timeline.label: Reentry
timeline.description: The mission ends with Earth reentry and splashdown.
